summary: Iteration 14 - Bug Fixes for Login/Signup and Market Data Speed. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend login, signup, and dashboard flows all working correctly. Market data shows all 3 markets (crypto, forex, indian) with LIVE indicator.

backend: Register new user and immediately login with those credentials SUCCESS
10 rapid logins in sequence don't get rate-limited (30/min limit) SUCCESS
Brute-force threshold is 15 (14 failed attempts all returned 401) SUCCESS
Market data /api/market/live returns all 3 markets SUCCESS
Market tick count increments rapidly (3+ ticks in 3 seconds) SUCCESS
Security headers still present (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy) SUCCESS
frontend: Login flow: fill email + password -> click Login -> redirects to /dashboard SUCCESS
Signup flow: fill name + email + password -> click Create Account -> redirects to /dashboard SUCCESS
Dashboard loads with LIVE indicator showing tick count (e.g., LIVE#107, LIVE#174)
Dashboard shows real-time data: 83 tracked assets (19C / 20F / 44I)
Markets page shows Crypto tab (19 assets)
Markets page shows Forex tab (20 pairs) with OANDA bid/ask/spread
Markets page shows Indian tab (44 assets) with indices and stocks
User name displayed in sidebar after signup

rate_limiting_relaxed.verification: 10 rapid logins succeeded without rate limiting

sanitize_input_email_corruption.description: Register endpoint now uses local variables (email, name) instead of mutating data.email/data.name
sanitize_input_email_corruption.verification: New user registration works and user can immediately login

market_data_speed.verification: Market tick increments 3+ times in 3 seconds

frontend_polling_speed.verification: LIVE indicator tick count updates rapidly

thread_pool_workers.verification: Market data loads quickly for all 3 markets

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing (test_signup_*, test_newuser_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified all bug fixes: 1) Rate limiting relaxed from 5/min to 30/min - 10 rapid logins work without rate limiting. 2) Brute-force threshold increased from 5 to 15 - 14 failed attempts return 401, not 429. 3) sanitize_input email corruption fixed - register uses local variables now, new users can register and immediately login. 4) Market data speed improved - crypto 10s, forex 3s, indian 60s. 5) Frontend polling 800ms (from 1500ms). 6) ThreadPoolExecutor 6 workers (from 3). All security headers still present. Both admins can access admin endpoints. Markets page shows all 3 markets with LIVE indicator. All APIs are LIVE (no mocking).
